seoTitle: How to Connect Zendesk to Jira for Dev Handoffs
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Zendesk to Jira using the official marketplace app, map fields, set up status triggers, and sync engineering updates to tickets.
intro: When support agents have to manually copy bug reports between systems, updates get lost and customers wait longer for answers. Connecting Zendesk to Jira through the official integration lets engineering and support teams share status updates automatically. This guide covers installing the app and wiring up the sync.

steps.heading: Open the Marketplace
steps.body: In Admin Center, expand Apps and Integrations and select Marketplace.

steps.heading: Install the Jira Cloud app
steps.body: Search for the official Jira Cloud app and click Install on your active Zendesk account.

steps.heading: Authenticate your Jira subdomain
steps.body: Input your target Jira subdomain handle and authenticate using your admin credentials.

steps.heading: Install the matching app in Jira
steps.body: Move to your Atlassian Jira instance and install the corresponding Zendesk app to complete the two-way link.

steps.heading: Map your fields
steps.body: Configure field-mapping rules so details like summaries, descriptions, and dropdown values sync across both systems.

steps.heading: Set up status triggers and test
steps.body: Set automated status synchronization triggers, then link a test ticket to a Jira issue and verify the sidebar updates.

faq.question: Do I need admin access on both Zendesk and Jira?
faq.answer: Yes, installing and authenticating the integration requires admin credentials on both platforms.

faq.question: Will resolving a Jira issue automatically update the linked ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, if you configure automated status synchronization triggers, ticket states can flip when the developer issue is marked resolved.

faq.question: What fields can be mapped between the two systems?
faq.answer: Common mappings include summaries, descriptions, and custom drop-down values, though this can be customized.

faq.question: How are engineering teams notified of new escalations?
faq.answer: The integration uses secure webhooks to instantly notify engineering teams about new escalations.
